message:
refactor(buffer): migrate from std::sync::Mutex to parking_lot::Mutex

Replace all std::sync::Mutex usage with parking_lot::Mutex throughout
the buffer service and its internal oneshot channel. This eliminates
all unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner()) poison-recovery boilerplate
since parking_lot::Mutex does not implement poisoning — it simply
provides lock() that always succeeds.

Also adds explicit turbofish on BufferFuture::error() calls where
type inference was previously relying on context that became
ambiguous after the Mutex change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
